home.title: MEY İnşaat — Home Building in Pendik, Istanbul
home.description: MEY İnşaat develops and builds housing in Pendik, Istanbul: El Ele, Çamoğlu and Maşuk apartments. The construction brand of the 23-year-old MEY Group.

satilik.title: Apartments for Sale in Pendik, Istanbul — MEY İnşaat
satilik.description: New 3+2 rooftop duplex in Pendik, direct from builder MEY İnşaat: 160 m², rooftop terrace, covered parking. El Ele Apartmanı — 13,750,000 TL.

corporate.title: About — MEY İnşaat, Home Builder in Pendik
corporate.description: Founded in 2021, MEY İnşaat is the construction brand of the 23-year-old MEY Group. Our story, values and the buildings completed in Pendik.

services.title: Residential Construction Services — MEY İnşaat
services.description: From land assessment to turnkey delivery: project development, permits and project management, reinforced-concrete structure, finishing works. Pendik/Istanbul.

contact.title: Contact — MEY İnşaat, Tuzla/Istanbul
